root_text.an10.218:1.1: “Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, sañcetanikānaṁ kammānaṁ katānaṁ upacitānaṁ appaṭisaṁveditvā byantībhāvaṁ vadāmi,
root_text.an10.218:1.2: tañca kho diṭṭheva dhamme upapajje vā apare vā pariyāye.
root_text.an10.218:1.3: Na tvevāhaṁ, bhikkhave, sañcetanikānaṁ kammānaṁ katānaṁ upacitānaṁ appaṭisaṁveditvā dukkhassantakiriyaṁ vadāmi.
root_text.an10.218:2.1: Tatra, bhikkhave, tividhā kāyakammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti;
root_text.an10.218:2.2: catubbidhā vacīkammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti;
root_text.an10.218:2.3: tividhā manokammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:3.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, tividhā kāyakammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti …pe…
root_text.an10.218:3.2: evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tividhā kāyakammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:4.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, catubbidhā vacīkammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti …pe…
root_text.an10.218:4.2: evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, catubbidhā vacīkammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:5.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, tividhā manokammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti …pe…
root_text.an10.218:5.2: evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tividhā manokammantasandosabyāpatti akusalasañcetanikā dukkhudrayā dukkhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:6.1: Tividhakāyakammantasandosabyāpattiakusalasañcetanikāhetu vā, bhikkhave, sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjanti, catubbidhavacīkammanta …pe… tividhamanokammantasandosabyāpattiakusalasañcetanikāhetu vā, bhikkhave, sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjanti.
root_text.an10.218:7.1: Nāhaṁ, bhikkhave, sañcetanikānaṁ kammānaṁ katānaṁ upacitānaṁ appaṭisaṁveditvā byantībhāvaṁ vadāmi,
root_text.an10.218:7.2: tañca kho diṭṭheva dhamme upapajje vā apare vā pariyāye.
root_text.an10.218:7.3: Na tvevāhaṁ, bhikkhave, sañcetanikānaṁ kammānaṁ katānaṁ upacitānaṁ appaṭisaṁveditvā dukkhassantakiriyaṁ vadāmi.
root_text.an10.218:8.1: Tatra kho, bhikkhave, tividhā kāyakammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti;
root_text.an10.218:8.2: catubbidhā vacīkammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti;
root_text.an10.218:8.3: tividhā manokammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:9.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, tividhā kāyakammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti …pe…
root_text.an10.218:9.2: evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tividhā kāyakammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:10.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, catubbidhā vacīkammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti …pe…
root_text.an10.218:10.2: evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, catubbidhā vacīkammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:11.1: Kathañca, bhikkhave, tividhā manokammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti …pe…
root_text.an10.218:11.2: evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tividhā manokammantasampatti kusalasañcetanikā sukhudrayā sukhavipākā hoti.
root_text.an10.218:12.1: Tividhakāyakammantasampattikusalasañcetanikāhetu vā, bhikkhave, sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti; catubbidhavacīkammantasampatti …pe… tividhamanokammantasampattikusalasañcetanikāhetu vā, bhikkhave, sattā kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjanti …pe…

translation_text.an10.218:1.1: “Mendicants, I don’t say that intentional deeds that have been performed and accumulated are eliminated without being experienced.
translation_text.an10.218:1.2: And that may be in this very life, or in the next life, or in some subsequent period.
translation_text.an10.218:1.3: But in any case, there is no making an end of suffering without experiencing intentional deeds that have been performed and accumulated, I say.
translation_text.an10.218:2.1: Now, there are three kinds of corruption and failure of bodily action that have unskillful intention, with suffering as their outcome and result.
translation_text.an10.218:2.2: There are four kinds of corruption and failure of verbal action that have unskillful intention, with suffering as their outcome and result.
translation_text.an10.218:2.3: There are three kinds of corruption and failure of mental action that have unskillful intention, with suffering as their outcome and result.
translation_text.an10.218:3.1: And what are the three kinds of corruption and failure of bodily action? …
translation_text.an10.218:3.2: These are the three kinds of corruption and failure of bodily action.
translation_text.an10.218:4.1: And what are the four kinds of corruption and failure of verbal action? …
translation_text.an10.218:4.2: These are the four kinds of corruption and failure of verbal action.
translation_text.an10.218:5.1: And what are the three kinds of corruption and failure of mental action? …
translation_text.an10.218:5.2: These are the three kinds of corruption and failure of mental action.
translation_text.an10.218:6.1: When their body breaks up, after death, sentient beings are reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell because of these three kinds of corruption and failure of bodily action, these four kinds of corruption and failure of verbal action, or these three kinds of corruption and failure of mental action that have unskillful intention, with suffering as their outcome and result.
translation_text.an10.218:7.1: I don’t say that intentional deeds that have been performed and accumulated are eliminated without being experienced.
translation_text.an10.218:7.2: And that may be in this very life, or in the next life, or in some subsequent period.
translation_text.an10.218:7.3: But in any case, there is no making an end of suffering without experiencing intentional deeds that have been performed and accumulated, I say.
translation_text.an10.218:8.1: Now, there are three kinds of successful bodily action that have skillful intention, with happiness as their outcome and result.
translation_text.an10.218:8.2: There are four kinds of successful verbal action that have skillful intention, with happiness as their outcome and result.
translation_text.an10.218:8.3: There are three kinds of successful mental action that have skillful intention, with happiness as their outcome and result.
translation_text.an10.218:9.1: And what are the three kinds of successful bodily action? …
translation_text.an10.218:9.2: These are the three kinds of successful bodily action.
translation_text.an10.218:10.1: And what are the four kinds of successful verbal action? …
translation_text.an10.218:10.2: These are the four kinds of successful verbal action.
translation_text.an10.218:11.1: And what are the three kinds of successful mental action? …
translation_text.an10.218:11.2: These are the three kinds of successful mental action.
translation_text.an10.218:12.1: When their body breaks up, after death, sentient beings are reborn in a good place, in heaven because of these three kinds of successful bodily action, these four kinds of successful verbal action, or these three kinds of successful mental action that have skillful intention, with happiness as their outcome and result. …”
